name: ChinaLin Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: ChinaLin Securities Co., Ltd. engages in the securities business in China. It is involved in securities brokerage, investment banking, asset management, investment management, and credit business activities. The company offers accounts; trading intermediary services; financial management products and services; capital market solutions, including restricted stock management and corporate refinancing; margin financing and securities lending, equity pledge, and contracted securities trading; and hedging solutions. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
